lead.description: Lead architect for Loot Realms. Handles complex decisions, code architecture, and delegates to the right specialist subagent.

build.description: General builder for everyday edits in Loot Realms.

plan.description: Planning specialist for breaking down large features into steps.

team.description: Run a full-team analysis on a task
team.template: As the lead architect, analyze the following request, then delegate focused subtasks to the appropriate specialist agents (@code, @review, @ui, @game-design, @multiplayer, @perf, @analyst, @creative). Synthesize their outputs into a single actionable plan. Request: {{args}}

review.description: Get a code review from the review agent
review.template: @review please review the current changes/files for code quality, bugs, and architecture issues. Focus on: {{args}}

design.template: @game-design design the following feature with mechanics, balance, and integration notes for Loot Realms: {{args}}

optimize.template: @perf analyze and optimize the performance of: {{args}}
